context: Tests whether the agent builds an AI-powered batch description pipeline following the skill's specific model choices, prompt structure, concurrency pattern, temperature settings, and draft-saving workflow.

checklist.name: Prompt templates in dedicated file
checklist.description: Prompt template strings are defined in a separate module file (e.g., lib/enrichmentPrompts.js or similar), not inline inside the generation function

checklist.name: Correct description model
checklist.description: Uses 'gpt-4o' (not gpt-3.5-turbo, gpt-4, gpt-4o-mini or other models) for description generation

checklist.name: Temperature in range
checklist.description: Temperature parameter for the description generation call is set to a value in the range 0.3–0.5 (inclusive)

checklist.name: max_tokens 400
checklist.description: max_tokens is set to 400 for the description generation API call

checklist.name: Three-part prompt structure
checklist.description: The description prompt instructs the model to produce: (1) an opening sentence, (2) a feature paragraph, and (3) a bulleted list of key features

checklist.name: Opening sentence word cap
checklist.description: The prompt explicitly constrains the opening sentence to a maximum of 20 words

checklist.name: Paragraph word count target
checklist.description: The prompt specifies a target length of 80–120 words for the feature paragraph

checklist.name: No superlatives constraint
checklist.description: The prompt explicitly instructs the model not to use superlatives such as 'best' or 'amazing'

checklist.name: Attributes-only constraint
checklist.description: The prompt contains an explicit instruction not to invent or guess product specifications beyond those provided

checklist.name: Concurrency limit of 5
checklist.description: Batch processing uses a chunk size or concurrency limit of 5 (not larger, not smaller) parallel API calls

checklist.name: Drafts saved as pending_review
checklist.description: Generated descriptions are saved to a drafts store/table with a status value of 'pending_review', not written directly to the published product record

checklist.name: Per-product error handling
checklist.description: Individual product failures are caught and logged without aborting the rest of the batch (try/catch per product inside the batch loop)
